rationale: In the citing paper, Singh, Hansen, and Gupta (2005) appears only once as a "see also" citation alongside Erdem (1998) and Erdem and Winer (1998) to support a general background claim that brand preferences can be correlated across categories. The paper does not discuss this cited study's model, measures, findings, or methods in detail, and it is not used as a direct basis for estimation choices or core hypotheses. This indicates a passing literature-context role rather than a distinct functional dependency.
